title: Route POC AJV instance through pi-project schema-validator's cache
body: POC v2 (analysis/poc-degree-zero-lens/render.ts:77) creates its own AJV instance per run for config + relations validation, matching pi-project's schema-validator.ts ESM/CJS import shim pattern. Production form must consume the existing schema-validator cache rather than spinning parallel AJV instances per consumer. Without routing, every consumer (compile.ts lens injection, walk_descendants Nunjucks global, validateRelations gate, cluster-render) compiles its own schemas — duplicate state, duplicate compile cost, fragmented invalidation strategy. Pure integration discipline; no new mechanism needed. Surfaced as gap #20 in the POC v2 evaluation; classified as package-bound because it requires pi-project edit.
